--- a/model.py
+++ b/model.py
@@ -3,6 +3,22 @@
 import torchvision

 import timm

 from transformers import AutoModel, Dinov2Config, Dinov2Model

+

+

+def build_head(hidden_size, num_classes, dropout=0.1):

+    head = nn.Sequential(

+        nn.Linear(hidden_size, hidden_size),

+        nn.GELU(),

+        nn.Dropout(dropout),

+        nn.Linear(hidden_size, num_classes),

+    )

+    for m in head.modules():

+        if isinstance(m, nn.Linear):

+            nn.init.trunc_normal_(m.weight, std=0.02)

+            if m.bias is not None:

+                nn.init.constant_(m.bias, 0)

+    return head

+

 

 class DINOv2Classifier(nn.Module):

     def __init__(self, num_classes=345, pretrained=True):

@@ -21,10 +37,7 @@

-        if self.head.bias is not None:

-            nn.init.constant_(self.head.bias, 0)

+        self.head = build_head(hidden_size, num_classes)

 

     def forward(self, x):

         outputs = self.backbone(x)
